title: Crosshair - Butterfly
description: A delicate butterfly-inspired crosshair that blends a dreamy aesthetic with clear visibility ʚїɞ
body:
A tiny crosshair pack made for the girls who love soft, dreamy details ✧

This pack adds a soft, butterfly-inspired crosshair designed to be clean, visible, and effortlessly pretty. Perfect for players who love an aesthetic touch while keeping their gameplay clear.
